textByHash.093b9beafe7c89e59171dd6495c7090b3c0c4a62: You've obviously never been swimming anywhere in the Tlati Rainforest...
textByHash.bde658fe1c80732f3ed9b21d176cad44036acfd7: Last week we had someone trying to churn butter in the agitator. They weren't around for long. I really wish they'd start properly vetting new society members.
textByHash.cee906f66559c7586c407f6cd0995fdc2dfb4dd4: I'm on duty, so you'll need to make this quick.
textByHash.db4a75e02e4448efe57717144f2dd4ad9be1aa9d: For me, its the Anti-leech lotion. I despise leeches.
textByHash.e65a68d8021a22c440329bda4639b217e806615e: I typically hang out in the lab and keep an eye the newbies. Someone needs to make sure no one breaks anything or loses an eye.
